Summary: Valid login redirects to requested app page
Steps: Open login page | Enter valid email and password | Click Login
Expected Result: User lands on requested return path and sees authenticated UI

Summary: Invalid password shows error and blocks login
Steps: Open login page | Enter valid email and wrong password | Click Login
Expected Result: Error message is shown and user remains unauthenticated

Summary: New user signup shows success or verification message
Steps: Open sign-up page | Enter new user details | Submit form
Expected Result: Signup completes with success or verification instruction

Summary: Callback flow returns user to origin app
Steps: Start login flow | Complete callback exchange
Expected Result: Session is created and user returns to origin route

Summary: Invalid return URL is blocked safely
Preconditions: Login URL has untrusted return target
Steps: Open crafted login URL with invalid returnTo | Authenticate
Expected Result: Unsafe return is blocked and safe destination is used

Summary: Session persists after browser refresh
Steps: Login successfully | Refresh browser
Expected Result: Session remains active after refresh

Summary: Logout clears session and protects secure actions
Steps: Click Logout | Attempt protected action
Expected Result: User is redirected to login for protected action

Summary: Multi-tab auth state remains consistent
Steps: Open app in two tabs | Login in tab A | Refresh tab B
Expected Result: Auth state is consistent across tabs

Summary: Hotels page loads with defaults
Steps: Open Hotels home page
Expected Result: Default city and hotel cards are visible

Summary: Changing city updates hotel list
Steps: Change city selection | Run search
Expected Result: Hotel list updates for selected city

Summary: Room type filter narrows hotel results
Steps: Switch room type filter Any to Deluxe or Suite
Expected Result: Visible hotel results match selected room type

Summary: Hotel name search returns matching records
Steps: Enter partial hotel name | Submit search
Expected Result: Only matching hotels are shown

Summary: Invalid date order is prevented
Steps: Set check-out earlier than check-in
Expected Result: Invalid date range is blocked or auto-corrected

Summary: Capacity validation blocks too many guests
Preconditions: Room with known capacity is selected
Steps: Enter guest count above capacity | Submit
Expected Result: Validation error appears and submit is blocked

Summary: Deep-link booking pre-fills form values
Preconditions: Valid booking URL params are prepared
Steps: Open booking page using deep-link params
Expected Result: Hotel and date fields are pre-filled correctly

Summary: Missing required fields blocks booking
Steps: Leave required traveler fields blank | Submit
Expected Result: Booking is not created and errors are shown

Summary: Invalid government ID shows validation error
Steps: Enter invalid ID format | Submit
Expected Result: ID validation message is shown and submit blocked

Summary: Valid booking submits successfully
Steps: Fill all required booking fields | Submit
Expected Result: Booking is created and confirmation is shown

Summary: New booking appears in My Bookings
Steps: Navigate to My Bookings
Expected Result: New booking is visible with correct details

Summary: Cancel booking updates status
Steps: Click Cancel on booking | Confirm action
Expected Result: Booking status changes to cancelled

Summary: Re-cancel on cancelled booking handled safely
Steps: Attempt cancel again
Expected Result: System handles safely with no duplicate change

Summary: Profile invalid email or phone blocked
Steps: Enter invalid email or phone | Click Save
Expected Result: Save is blocked with validation errors

Summary: Valid profile save persists after refresh
Steps: Enter valid profile updates | Save | Refresh page
Expected Result: Updated profile values remain persisted

Summary: Hotels taste widget loads recommendations
Preconditions: Widget is visible on Hotels page
Steps: Select city in taste widget
Expected Result: Recommendations load for selected city

Summary: Widget restaurant search filters recommendations
Steps: Enter restaurant text in widget search
Expected Result: Recommendation list is filtered correctly

Summary: Widget link opens Taste app with context
Preconditions: Widget is visible on Hotels page
Steps: Click Open Full Taste Library
Expected Result: Taste app opens on expected route

Summary: Taste page loads with defaults
Steps: Open Taste home page
Expected Result: Default city and dish cards are visible

Summary: Changing city resets stale restaurant filter
Steps: Apply restaurant filter | Change city
Expected Result: Incompatible restaurant filter is reset

Summary: Restaurant search filters dishes correctly
Steps: Enter restaurant name and search
Expected Result: Matching dishes are shown

Summary: Dish type filter updates visible dishes
Steps: Switch dish type filter
Expected Result: Visible dish list updates by type

Summary: Anonymous Add to Library redirects to login
Steps: Click Add to Library on any dish
Expected Result: User is redirected to login

Summary: Authenticated Add to Library saves item
Steps: Click Add to Library
Expected Result: Item is saved and success state appears

Summary: Duplicate add handled without corruption
Steps: Click Add to Library on same item again
Expected Result: No broken state and duplication policy is enforced

Summary: Library groups entries by city
Preconditions: Library has items from multiple cities
Steps: Open Library page
Expected Result: Items are grouped under correct city sections

Summary: Remove from Library updates UI and backend
Preconditions: Library has at least one item
Steps: Remove item | Refresh page
Expected Result: Item is removed and does not return after refresh

Summary: Empty state appears when library is empty
Preconditions: Library is empty for test user
Steps: Open Library page
Expected Result: Empty state message and action are displayed

Summary: Invalid profile fields block save
Steps: Enter invalid required or formatted fields | Save
Expected Result: Save is blocked and validation message appears

Summary: Valid profile save persists
Steps: Enter valid updates | Save | Refresh page
Expected Result: Profile updates persist after refresh

Summary: Taste hotels widget loads city hotels
Preconditions: Hotels widget is visible on Taste page
Steps: Select city in hotels widget
Expected Result: Hotel recommendations load for selected city

Summary: Find Hotels applies filters in widget
Steps: Set city and dates and room type | Click Find Hotels
Expected Result: Returned hotel list matches selected filters

Summary: Book Now opens Hotels booking with params
Preconditions: Hotels widget has at least one result
Steps: Click Book Now on a hotel
Expected Result: Hotels booking page opens with correct prefilled data

Summary: Backend or network error shows clear message
Preconditions: Ability to simulate API failure exists
Steps: Trigger taste API timeout or 5xx
Expected Result: User sees clear error message and app remains stable

Summary: End-to-end flow works across apps
Preconditions: Valid user and seed data are ready
Steps: Login | Save taste item | Navigate to hotels | Create booking | Open My Bookings
Expected Result: Full cross-app journey completes successfully

Summary: Hotels-initiated login returns to same route
Preconditions: User is logged out on Hotels route
Steps: Click Sign In from Hotels | Authenticate
Expected Result: User returns to same Hotels route after login

Summary: Taste-initiated login returns to same route
Preconditions: User is logged out on Taste route
Steps: Click Sign In from Taste | Authenticate
Expected Result: User returns to same Taste route after login

Summary: Browser refresh preserves valid session mid-flow
Preconditions: User is authenticated in active flow
Steps: Refresh browser during flow
Expected Result: Session remains valid and flow is recoverable

Summary: Session expiry prompts re-login and recovers
Steps: Expire session | Attempt protected action | Re-login
Expected Result: User is prompted to login and flow recovers safely

Summary: Failed test captures network and console logs
Steps: Run controlled failing test
Expected Result: Failure bundle includes HAR and console log and trace and screenshot and video

Summary: Failed test auto-creates Jira bug with evidence
Steps: Run controlled failing test in CI
Expected Result: Jira bug is created with artifacts and links

Summary: Xray execution links failed tests to defects
Steps: Run suite | Import results to Xray
Expected Result: Execution is created with statuses and failed tests linked to defects
